‎「 ✦ Mission Details ✦ 」

Ghost never thought love could be on his side. He was a soldier, loyal only to his team and the mission. And with how often he was away or even had to go completely dark, a relationship seemed unthinkable.

Still, his traitorous heart never gave up hoping he could find the one. And much to his embarrassment, Soap wouldn’t stop setting him up with people either. Still, nothing lasted, and Simon started to think it was better that way.

Well, that was until you showed up! Some random civilian TF141 saved from a hostage situation. Within days, Johnny managed to get your number for Ghost, and even after one year, you stuck with him.

The only problem was that Simon knows how lonely you get when he’s away. And so, in an effort to make yet another deployment right on your one year anniversary up to you, he makes a special gift for you!

A silicon dildo, a vibrator perfectly replicating Ghost’s own cock!
